items.name: Enterprise Digital Platform
items.description: Multi-brand hospitality platform spanning booking engines, loyalty, content and integrations — designed for global scale and operational resilience.
outcomes: Unified architecture across 10+ properties and digital touchpoints
40% reduction in time-to-market for new brand launches
Headless CMS enabling marketing autonomy without engineering bottlenecks

items.name: PromptVault
items.description: Production-grade AI prompt library with fuzzy search, category filters, and one-click copy — built for engineering teams adopting LLM workflows.
outcomes: Centralised prompt governance for development teams
Sub-100ms client-side search across 40+ curated prompts
Deployed on GitHub Pages with zero backend dependency

items.name: Cloud-Native Microservices
items.description: Event-driven microservices platform with API gateway, service mesh patterns, and observability baked in from day one.
outcomes: 99.9% uptime SLA through circuit breakers and graceful degradation
Standardised CI/CD pipelines across all service teams

items.name: Headless Content Platform
items.description: Composable content architecture decoupling editorial workflows from presentation layers — powering web, mobile and third-party channels.
outcomes: Single content source feeding web, app and partner APIs
Editorial publish cycles reduced from days to hours

items.name: Discope
items.description: High-performance disk usage analyser built in Rust — visualising storage hierarchies with native speed and cross-platform support.
outcomes: 10× faster directory scans vs Node.js equivalents
Native macOS experience with SwiftUI-grade performance in Rust

items.name: AI Conversational Platform
items.description: Multi-channel conversational AI integrating Dialogflow, speech interfaces, and human handoff — deployed across voice and web channels.
outcomes: 60% reduction in support ticket volume via intelligent routing
Seamless agent handoff preserving full conversation context
Voice + web channel parity with unified NLU pipeline
